name: Venn
description: Three overlapping discs mixing where they meet, the rosette re-colouring on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { width: 52%; height: 52%; margin: 12% 24% 36% 24%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); mix-blend-mode: screen; :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -58%; top: 78%; @size: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); mix-blend-mode: screen; -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 58%; top: 78%; @size: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); mix-blend-mode: screen; -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
